who: restaurant owners processing 5–15 food safety inspections/month
offer: For restaurant owners processing 5–15 food safety inspections/month, inefficient report compilation causes compliance issues. We automate report generation instead of manual report compilation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient compilation of food safety inspection reports leading to potential compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant owners
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to restaurant owners with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among restaurant owners
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation and user-friendly interface for data entry on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
